{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Star
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Star]] killed [[Clockworker]] for betraying them.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
